zh.lifeSummary: 當Ivo d'Harcourt於大約1105年出生在法國豪-諾門迪艾哈爾庫特時，他的父親Guillaume d'Harcourt16歲，母親Agnes Huguette d'Amboise17歲。他和Rohese Peverell至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1190年享年86歲。

nameMeanings.name: d'Harcourt
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin) and French: habitational name from any of the places in Eure and Calvados named Harcourt, from Old French cour(t) ‘court, farmyard’ (see Court ) with an obscure first element. This surname is very rare in France.

English: habitational name from either of two places in Shropshire named Harcourt. The one near Cleobury Mortimer gets the name from Old English heafocere ‘hawker, falconer’ + cot ‘hut, cottage’; the one near Wem has as its first element Old English hearpere (see Harper ).

History: The surname of French origin (see 1 above) is listed along with the equally rare or even extinct variants or altered forms Haraucourt, Herancourt, and Héraucourt in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors.

variants.name: Court
meanings: English: topographic or occupational name from Middle English curt, court ‘large house’ (a word of the same ultimately Latin origin as 2 below), denoting someone who lived or worked in a manor house or castle, a courtly retainer.
French: topographic name from Old French co(u)rt ‘court, farmyard’ (from Latin cohors, cors, genitive cohortis, cortis ‘court, farmyard, enclosure’).

English and French: nickname for a physically small man, or ironically for a large man, from the adjective Middle English curt, Old French co(u)rt ‘short, small’ (from Latin curtus ‘curtailed, truncated, cut short, broken off’). Compare French Lecourt .

nameMeanings.name: Ivo
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Form of   Yves   used in Germany and occasionally in the English-speaking world. It represents the nominative case of the Latinized form of the name.

en.lifeSummary: When Ivo d'Harcourt was born about 1105, in Harcourt, Eure, Upper Normandy, France, his father, Guillaume d'Harcourt, was 16 and his mother, Agnes Huguette d'Amboise, was 17. He had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Rohese Peverell. He died in 1190, at the age of 86.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ivo d'Harcourt est né environ 1105, à Harcourt, Eure, Haute-Normandie, France, son père, Guillaume d'Harcourt, avait 16 ans et sa mère, Agnes Huguette d'Amboise, avait 17 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Rohese Peverell. Il est décédé en 1190, à l’âge de 86 ans.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ivo d'Harcourt è nato il circa 1105 nel Harcourt, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Francia, il suo padre, Guillaume d'Harcourt, aveva 16 anni e il suo madre, Agnes Huguette d'Amboise, aveva 17 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia con Rohese Peverell. Morì nel 1190, all'età di 86 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Ivo d'Harcourtが約1105年にフランスハウテ-ノーマンディエウアハーコウルトで生まれた時，父Guillaume d'Harcourtは16歳，母Agnes Huguette d'Amboiseは17歳であった。彼はRohese Peverellとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1190年に86歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ivo d'Harcourt(이)가 대략 1105년 프랑스 하테-노먼디 우르 하르쿠르트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Guillaume d'Harcourt(은)는 16세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Huguette d'Amboise(은)는 17세였다. 그는 Rohese Peverell(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1190년 86세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ivo d'Harcourt родился около 1105 г. в местности харкоурт, эур, хауте-норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени Guillaume d'Harcourt было 16 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Huguette d'Amboise, 17. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Rohese Peverell. Он умер в 1190 г. в возрасте 86 лет.
